title: Redlight PvP
description: Redlight PvP is a modpack to play hypixel with class.
body:
# Redlight PvP
Redlight PvP is a modpack made for Hypixel or other PvP modpacks!

Redlight PvP is based on performance and looks! It features mods like ETF and EMF to use Fresh Animations.
It features sodium for more performance and iris to use shaders. It has multiple performance mods and has faithfull 64x and Fresh + a compatibility texture pack to give you the best experiance for PvP.
